creator: dchagin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Edward Tomasz Napierala from comment #0)
well, recent aarch64 futex changes is due to futex_op method which is not used by golang on amd64 as far as I see. could you please do ktrace/kdump pair? unfortunatelly, due to sanctions, I dont have access to parallels vm any more.
